measurement_note: Size is both t, the participating-team count, and m, the match count. The unique directed fixtures form a cycle of scoreless draws, so every team has two matches, two points, and zero goal difference. Normalizing and aggregating takes O(m + t log t) time including the required standings sort. A correct slower query that cross-joins every team with every match before conditional aggregation processes O(tm) pairs, completes all tiers, and fails only by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 8 teams in a scoreless cycle
benchmark: 32 teams in a scoreless cycle
benchmark: 64 teams in a scoreless cycle
